properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 C3 V4 C3 V5 C3

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I may be mocked and scorned By this whole world Just like my Jesus was I may be hunted down or even persecuted But it's okay once I have His Holy Spirit

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: I know this world will reject me And my friends may despise me But that's okay I'm not here for these purposes I'm about my Father's will And my greatest desire is for the fullness Of Him to be found in me When He returns that day

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: So, I'm crying out for Your Holy Spirit It makes no sense for my existence without It So, I'm crying out for Your Holy Spirit More of You is what I need for Without You I cannot live I need You, Lord I'm desperate for You, God

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Lord, I speak about change From this old body But I know I will never see these things If You're not within me So I'm here on my knees Crying, "Jesus, please fill me." 'Cause when I see how You can take a broken vessel And mold it into Your image Lord

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: I lay my life down before Thee 'Cause I know my soul You can preserve Lord, if You take me and You mold me Into Your Word Then I know that I will make it for sure 'Cause I will have your Holy Spirit within me It will be a daily walk with You, Lord
